gatewayClassName.description: GatewayClass to attach the tenant Gateway to. Must exist cluster-wide. Default matches the Cilium-managed class.

tlsPassthroughServices.description: Names (from publishing.exposedServices) whose traffic is TLS-passthrough rather than TLS-terminate. For each such service a dedicated HTTPS listener with tls.mode=Passthrough is rendered on the Gateway, and the service is expected to attach a TLSRoute instead of an HTTPRoute.
